<@1344504250784551014> Hello, may I ask if there are any spam ads? I checked the chat records and couldn't find their existence. They may have been deleted
If you find someone posting spam ads next time, can you take a screenshot of their account homepage and send me a private message? So I can kick it out of the channel, thank you very much🌹
there was someone who sent a "free withdrawal" scam message earlier, i think other mods might have wiped the user's messages
Do we have guides for basic deck building in this mode? I just wanted to try and get the one time rewards.
Y'know, that never occurred to me
I think there's an overarching mechanics video somewhere buried in the gameplay guide, but it doesn't tell you anything that particularly matters

Other than some of the basics like "characters who use strikes like wheels that buff strikes" you generally figure out what depraved shit people are running fairly quickly after you see the exact same fucking team four times in a row past 1500 so you really only have to do a minimal amount of legwork to beat the bots in the first 1000 score and then after that you just steal whatever anyone else is doing on sight
The first thing you ever learn to use and/or beat is Frenzy Lotan. The Mythag four are a workable staple.
I really do need to find a replacement for poison
thank you. I guess I'll just have to play more lol. I'm kinda liking the mode too but I don't really know meta stuff
A few of the easier things come to mind but it depends on who you have
I need Tulu asap
mood

It may be a stupid question, but I can't explain it, so please explain it to me. In the first turn Liz used her skills Guardia (cost 0) To receive an enhanced buff (25% dmg) and then use the skill Emerald to cause 16 bleed dmg. So she will cause 16+25%x16 = 20 dmg but in reality she causes up to 30dmg, I checked the card information used at the top left it only says it causes 20dmg.Then one or two turns later Cle used the skill of causing 15 bleed dmg but in reality it caused 23 dmg although both did not have WoD. Is this a cheating player or is it because I lack knowledge? Thank you.
did your characters have falter debuff on them
falter buffs their damage by 50%
and applies to bleed without being cleared
Agree, probably falter.  20 * 1.5 = 30.  15* 1.5 = 22.5, rounds up to 23. numbers checks out
And he has 2 falter, one from skill, one from wheel. interesting combo . I didn't know bleed doesn't consume the falter debuff
Alva the sequel

they make it back to 3
